summary: Frontend-only testing of SVG Logo component and CV upload timer. All tests passed. Logo renders correctly as SVG on Landing (header size='sm', hero size='xl' with white background) and Dashboard (navbar size='md'). CV upload progress timer works correctly with step-by-step progress and elapsed time counter.

landing_page_logo: Hero section logo (size='xl') renders with data-testid='logo-reactif-pro'
Hero logo has white background container
Hero logo text and subtitle visible
dashboard_logo: Dashboard navbar logo (size='md') renders with data-testid='logo-reactif-pro'
cv_upload_zone: Upload zone text 'Chargez votre CV (PDF, DOCX, TXT)' visible
CV model cards (classique, competences, fonctionnel, mixte) present
CV model cards grayed out (opacity-50) before upload
cv_upload_progress_timer: Progress steps visible (Lecture du document, Extraction du contenu, Identification des savoir-faire, etc.)
'Analyse IA en cours' header text visible
dashboard_navigation: All 7 nav items found: Tableau de bord, Passeport, Coffre-fort, Observatoire, Indice Évolution, Emplois, Formations
role_switching: Role switch updates badge color (blue for particulier, emerald for entreprise)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all logo SVG, CV timer, navigation tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Test created temporary .txt CV file for upload testing to verify progress timer functionality.
test_credentials: Anonymous authentication. Use POST /api/auth/anonymous with {"role":"particulier"} to get token.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SVG Logo component (LogoReactifPro.jsx) tested and verified. Logo has 4 sizes: sm (28px icon), md (36px icon), lg (56px icon), xl (80px icon). Logo renders with data-testid='logo-reactif-pro' on all pages. CV upload progress timer (CvAnalysisSection in ParticulierView.jsx) shows 12 steps during AI analysis with elapsed time counter. Timer uses data-testid='cv-upload-progress' and 'cv-timer'. All features working correctly.

features_verified.logo_svg_landing_header: ✓ SVG logo renders in header (size='sm', 28px icon)
features_verified.logo_svg_landing_hero: ✓ SVG logo renders in hero section (size='xl', 80px icon) with white background
features_verified.logo_svg_dashboard: ✓ SVG logo renders in dashboard navbar (size='md', 36px icon)
features_verified.logo_text_visible: ✓ 'RE'ACTIF PRO' text visible on all logo instances
features_verified.navigation_links: ✓ All nav links accessible and clickable
